if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND v.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND v.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVoc :: selectById */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vm.code_label AS voc_master_cd_nm , cd_vd.code_label AS voc_detail_cd_nm FROM sy_voc v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vm ON cd_vm.code_grp = 'VOC_MASTER' AND cd_vm.code_value = v.voc_master_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vd ON cd_vd.code_grp = 'VOC_DETAIL' AND cd_vd.code_value = v.voc_detail_cd WHERE v.voc_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVoc :: selectList */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vm.code_label AS voc_master_cd_nm , cd_vd.code_label AS voc_detail_cd_nm FROM sy_voc v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vm ON cd_vm.code_grp = 'VOC_MASTER' AND cd_vm.code_value = v.voc_master_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vd ON cd_vd.code_grp = 'VOC_DETAIL' AND cd_vd.code_value = v.voc_detail_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVoc :: selectPageList */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vm.code_label AS voc_master_cd_nm , cd_vd.code_label AS voc_detail_cd_nm FROM sy_voc v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vm ON cd_vm.code_grp = 'VOC_MASTER' AND cd_vm.code_value = v.voc_master_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vd ON cd_vd.code_grp = 'VOC_DETAIL' AND cd_vd.code_value = v.voc_detail_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(v.*) /* base.sy :: SyVoc :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_voc v
